proven.claim: PROVEN: >= guard is sound — no node at or after logLine is ever processed.
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 295
; PROVEN: >= guard is sound — no node at or after logLine is ever processed.
; Frame: preconditions + transition + negation of property → expect unsat.

(declare-const node_row Int)
(declare-const log_line Int)
(declare-const node_processed Int)  ; 1 = variable_declarator data written into types

; Precondition: log_line is a valid source row
(assert (>= log_line 0))

; Code transition: visit() guard — if (node.startPosition.row >= logLine) return
; Models: node_processed = 0 whenever the guard fires
(assert (=> (>= node_row log_line) (= node_processed 0)))

; Negation of property: a node at or after logLine IS processed
(assert (>= node_row log_line))
(assert (= node_processed 1))

(check-sat)

violations.claim: REACHABLE: const x = 5; console.log(x) on one line — x's declarator excluded by >= guard
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 295
; REACHABLE: const x = 5; console.log(x) on one line — x's declarator excluded by >= guard
; despite x being bound before the log call in execution order.

(declare-const decl_row Int)
(declare-const decl_col Int)
(declare-const log_row Int)
(declare-const log_col Int)
(declare-const decl_processed Int)  ; 1 = written into types, 0 = skipped

; Code transition: logLine = logNode.startPosition.row
(assert (>= log_row 0))

; Code transition: declaration is on the same row as the log (same-line declaration)
(assert (= decl_row log_row))

; Code transition: declaration column precedes log column — it IS before the log
(assert (>= log_col 1))
(assert (< decl_col log_col))

; Code transition: guard in visit() — if (node.startPosition.row >= logLine) return
(assert (=> (>= decl_row log_row) (= decl_processed 0)))

; Violation: declaration precedes the log in column order yet is not processed
(assert (= decl_processed 0))

(check-sat)

violations.claim: REACHABLE: Single-line function → body_start_row = log_line → visit(body) returns immediately.
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P6
; LINE: 295
; REACHABLE: Single-line function → body_start_row = log_line → visit(body) returns immediately.
; The entire local-type inference pass produces an empty map despite declarations existing.

(declare-const body_start_row Int)
(declare-const log_line Int)
(declare-const num_decls_in_body Int)   ; declarations present in the function body
(declare-const types_entry_count Int)   ; entries written into the types map

; Code transition: logLine = logNode.startPosition.row (single-line function body)
(assert (= log_line 0))

; Code transition: body node starts on same row (opening brace on same line as log)
(assert (= body_start_row log_line))

; Code transition: body contains at least one declaration that could be typed
(assert (> num_decls_in_body 0))

; Code transition: visit(body) fires guard immediately — no children visited, no entries written
(assert (=> (>= body_start_row log_line) (= types_entry_count 0)))

; Violation: types is empty even though declarations exist
(assert (= types_entry_count 0))

(check-sat)
